curriculum: Test taxonomy — unit, integration, behavioral, property, mutation, metamorphic
Mutation testing — operators, mutation score, equivalent mutant problem
Property-based testing — generators, shrinking, invariant specification
Metamorphic testing — relations, source test cases, follow-up test cases
Test oracle problem — expected value, invariant, differential, metamorphic
Coverage criteria — statement, branch, MC/DC, path, subsumption lattice
Formal verification — model checking, theorem proving, abstract interpretation
Test adequacy — adequacy criteria, subsumption, mutation score as proxy
Boundary value analysis — equivalence partitioning, boundary conditions
Grammar-based testing — grammar coverage, derivation trees, mutation of grammars
Model-based testing — state machines, transition coverage, sneak paths
Symbolic execution — path conditions, constraint solving, concolic testing
Governance audit testing — meta-testing of governance behavioral tests
Test suite maintenance — flaky tests, test debt, obsolescence detection
Probabilistic testing — hypothesis testing, confidence intervals, effect sizes
